mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_MEETING (title, meeting_date, location, empino, empinm, content) VALUES (#{title}, #{meetingDate}, #{location}, #{empino}, #{empinm}, #{content})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM T_MEETING
delete_at IS NULL
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY meeting_date DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT #{skip}, #{amount}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_MEETING
delete_at IS NULL
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT m.*, a.attachment_id, a.original_name, a.stored_name, a.file_path, att.empino AS att_empino, e.empinm AS att_empinm, e.dept AS att_dept, e.position AS att_position FROM T_MEETING m LEFT JOIN T_ATTACHMENT a ON m.meeting_id = a.meeting_id LEFT JOIN T_MEETING_ATTENDEES att ON m.meeting_id = att.meeting_id LEFT JOIN T_EMPLOYEES e ON att.empino = e.empino WHERE m.meeting_id = #{id} AND m.delete_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE T_MEETING SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, location = #{location}, meeting_date = #{meetingDate}, empinm = #{empinm}, empino = #{empino}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE meeting_id = #{meetingId}
